title: Excessive lines in Lambda functions
description: Lambda functions (introduced with Java 8) should be used only if the behavior to be injected can be defined in a few lines of code. Otherwise, the source code can quickly become unreadable.
recommendation: Refactor the lambda function to reduce the number of lines.
impact: Unreadable code can lead to maintenance issues and potential security vulnerabilities.

checks.message: Refactor the lambda function to reduce the number of lines.
